description: Adversarial pack: single-byte mutation in receipt_pack.jsonl. All other files identical to golden_minimal.

expected_verification.downstream_errors_note: The verifier does NOT short-circuit. Additional downstream errors may occur (head_hash mismatch, receipt_integrity mismatch) because the tampered content changes the recomputed receipt integrity. These downstream errors are implementation-dependent — second implementations may short-circuit after the first E_MANIFEST_TAMPER.

conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier MUST report passed=false. It MUST include at least one error with code E_MANIFEST_TAMPER referencing receipt_pack.jsonl. Whether additional downstream errors are reported is implementation-specific.
